div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 818px; height: 1px; padding-top: 48px; margin-left: 249px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #5A6C86;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#5A6C86, #8494aa); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

path.style: stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(204, 255, 255)); animation: 500ms linear 0s infinite normal none running ge-flow-animation-hmflX7b3vsgtYOGgGvkc; stroke-dashoffset: 24;
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(204, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(204, 255, 255));

ellipse.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 128, 240), rgb(50, 160, 255));

ellipse.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(162, 0, 37), rgb(153, 153, 255)); stroke: light-dark(transparent, rgb(255, 153, 51));
